name: easel
description: Easel - a local infinite-canvas AI image studio for Codex, powered by tldraw. Generate, edit (image-to-image), iterate and compare images right on the canvas with your own image API.

interface.shortDescription: An infinite-canvas AI image studio inside Codex.
interface.longDescription: Easel turns a tldraw-powered infinite canvas into an AI image creation workstation. Generate images directly on the canvas, run true image-to-image edits, spin up variants, compare and iterate - all driven by your own image API (BYOK, multi-provider). The Codex agent can also read and drive the canvas. Canvas data stays in the active project workspace.
defaultPrompt: Open the Easel canvas for this project.
Generate an image on the Easel canvas: a product poster for ...
Edit the selected Easel image: change ... and keep the rest.
